title: Part 7 – Entraînement 1 : e-mails & annonces
instructions: Lisez chaque passage et répondez aux questions.

items.passage:
From: Sandra Koch, HR Manager
To: All Employees
Subject: New Hybrid Work Schedule — Q4

Dear team,

Starting October 1st, we are updating our hybrid work schedule. Employees will be required to work from the office a minimum of three days per week. Tuesdays and Wednesdays are mandatory on-site days for all staff. The third day can be chosen freely from Monday, Thursday, or Friday.

Employees wishing to request an exception to this schedule due to personal circumstances should submit a written request to their line manager by September 20th.

Full details are available on the HR portal.

questions.prompt: How many days per week must employees work on site?
questions.explanation: "a minimum of three days per week".

questions.prompt: Which days are mandatory for all staff?
questions.explanation: "Tuesdays and Wednesdays are mandatory on-site days for all staff".

questions.prompt: By when must exception requests be submitted?
questions.explanation: "submit a written request... by September 20th".

items.passage:
WANTED: Office Space for Rent

Prime commercial office space available in the Central Business District. 450 square metres across two floors, fully furnished with high-speed internet, meeting rooms, and a shared kitchen. Parking for up to eight vehicles included.

Monthly rent: €4,200 (utilities not included)
Minimum lease: 12 months
Available from: February 1st

For viewing appointments or further information, contact Westgate Property on 01 555 7890 or email info@westgateproperty.ie.

No agency fees.

questions.prompt: What is included in the rent?
choices: Furniture, internet, meeting rooms, and parking
questions.explanation: "fully furnished with high-speed internet, meeting rooms, and a shared kitchen. Parking for up to eight vehicles included."

questions.prompt: What is the minimum lease period?
questions.explanation: "Minimum lease: 12 months".

questions.prompt: What is notable about the agency fees?
choices: They are ten percent of rent
They are included in the monthly rent
questions.explanation: "No agency fees."

items.passage:
From: Customer Service
To: Henry Ashford
Subject: Your Order #88421 — Shipping Update

Dear Mr. Ashford,

We are writing to inform you of a delay affecting your recent order (#88421) placed on November 3rd.

Due to unexpected demand for one of the items in your order — the Solarmate Portable Charger — this product is currently out of stock. We expect to receive a new shipment by November 22nd.

You have two options:
1. Wait for the full order to ship together on or around November 22nd.
2. Receive the in-stock items now, with the Solarmate Portable Charger shipped separately at no additional cost once restocked.

Please reply to this email to let us know your preference. If we do not hear from you by November 12th, we will proceed with option 1.

questions.prompt: Why is the order delayed?
choices: One item is out of stock
questions.explanation: "the Solarmate Portable Charger — this product is currently out of stock".

questions.prompt: What happens if the customer does not reply by November 12th?
choices: Option 1 is applied — full order shipped together
questions.explanation: "If we do not hear from you by November 12th, we will proceed with option 1".

questions.prompt: What is option 2?
choices: Wait for all items to ship together
Receive in-stock items now, the charger later at no extra cost
Exchange the charger for another product
questions.explanation: "Receive the in-stock items now, with the Solarmate Portable Charger shipped separately at no additional cost once restocked".

items.passage:
JOB ADVERTISEMENT

Financial Analyst — Permanent Position
Location: Dublin, Ireland (Hybrid)
Salary: €45,000–€55,000 depending on experience

We are seeking a motivated Financial Analyst to join our growing finance team. The successful candidate will be responsible for preparing monthly management accounts, analysing financial data, and supporting the annual budgeting process.

Requirements:
• A degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field
• At least two years of relevant experience
• Strong Excel skills and experience with financial modelling
• Excellent communication skills

To apply, send your CV and cover letter to careers@fingroup.ie by January 15th. Interviews will be held in the last week of January.

questions.prompt: What type of contract is offered?
questions.explanation: "Financial Analyst — Permanent Position".

questions.prompt: What is the minimum experience required?
questions.explanation: "At least two years of relevant experience".

questions.prompt: When will interviews take place?
questions.explanation: "Interviews will be held in the last week of January".

items.passage:
NOTICE: Building Access Changes

Dear tenants,

Effective Monday, September 9th, all access to the building outside of regular business hours (8:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.) will require the use of your new digital access card.

Physical keys will no longer be valid after September 8th. If you have not yet collected your new access card, please visit the management office on the ground floor before Friday, September 6th.

The building will also be installing additional CCTV cameras over the weekend of September 7th–8th. During this time, access to the basement level will be temporarily unavailable.

Thank you for your understanding.

questions.prompt: What is required to access the building outside regular hours from September 9th?
questions.explanation: "all access to the building outside of regular business hours will require the use of your new digital access card".

questions.prompt: When must tenants collect their new card by?
questions.explanation: "please visit the management office... before Friday, September 6th".

questions.prompt: What will be temporarily unavailable during the weekend of September 7th–8th?
questions.explanation: "access to the basement level will be temporarily unavailable".

items.passage:
Riverside Community Centre — Spring Programme

We are pleased to announce our Spring Activity Programme, running from March 3rd to May 23rd.

Highlights include:
• Monday evenings: Beginner Photography (6–8 p.m.)
• Wednesday mornings: Senior Fitness Class (10–11:30 a.m.)
• Friday afternoons: Youth Art Workshop (3–5 p.m., ages 8–14)
• Every Saturday: Family Cookery Classes (11 a.m.–1 p.m.)

All classes must be booked in advance. Early bird registration (before February 15th) entitles participants to a 15% discount. Registration can be completed online at www.riversidecc.org or in person at the centre.

Corporate group bookings are also available. Please contact us at events@riversidecc.org for further information.

questions.prompt: When does the Spring Programme begin?
questions.explanation: "running from March 3rd to May 23rd".

questions.prompt: What discount is available for early registration?
questions.explanation: "Early bird registration (before February 15th) entitles participants to a 15% discount".

questions.prompt: Which class is designed for a specific age group?
questions.explanation: "Youth Art Workshop (3–5 p.m., ages 8–14)" — the only class specifying an age range.

items.passage:
From: IT Helpdesk
To: All Staff
Subject: Scheduled Email System Upgrade

Dear colleagues,

Our email system will be upgraded this Saturday, from 10 p.m. to 6 a.m. Sunday morning.

During this window, you will not be able to send or receive emails. Any emails sent to you during this time will be queued and delivered automatically once the system is back online.

Actions to take before 10 p.m. Saturday:
• Save any important email drafts locally
• Download attachments you may need over the weekend
• If you have urgent communications, use the internal messaging app (ConnectHub) as an alternative

The upgrade will improve email speed and add new security features. We apologise for any inconvenience.

questions.prompt: How long will the email system be unavailable?
questions.explanation: From 10 p.m. Saturday to 6 a.m. Sunday = 8 hours.

questions.prompt: What happens to emails sent during the maintenance window?
choices: They are bounced back to the sender
They are queued and delivered once the system is back online
They are redirected to a backup address
questions.explanation: "Any emails sent to you during this time will be queued and delivered automatically once the system is back online".

questions.prompt: What alternative communication tool is suggested?
questions.explanation: "use the internal messaging app (ConnectHub) as an alternative".

items.passage:
TRAVEL ADVISORY — Eastbridge Insurance

Attn: Corporate Policyholders

Eastbridge Insurance wishes to inform corporate clients that travel insurance coverage for business trips to the following regions has been temporarily suspended: Northern Kova, East Talian Province, and the Rhandor Coast.

This decision follows updated risk assessments issued by the Foreign Affairs Ministry. Coverage will be reviewed and reinstated once conditions improve.

Employees already on assignment in these areas are still covered until the end of their current trip. All new travel to these regions after October 3rd will not be covered under standard corporate travel policies.

For queries, please contact your dedicated account manager or call our corporate helpline at 1800 344 900.

questions.prompt: What has Eastbridge Insurance done regarding certain regions?
choices: Suspended travel insurance coverage for those regions
questions.explanation: "travel insurance coverage... has been temporarily suspended".

questions.prompt: Are employees currently on assignment in the affected regions still covered?
choices: No, all coverage has ended immediately
Yes, until the end of their current trip
Only if they return before October 3rd
questions.explanation: "Employees already on assignment in these areas are still covered until the end of their current trip".

questions.prompt: From what date will new travel to those regions not be covered?
questions.explanation: "All new travel to these regions after October 3rd will not be covered".

items.passage:
PRODUCT REVIEW — ProDesk Standing Desk Converter

Rating: ★★★★☆ (4/5)

I purchased the ProDesk Standing Desk Converter three months ago after experiencing lower back pain from sitting all day. The setup was straightforward and took about twenty minutes.

The height adjustment mechanism is smooth and can go from sitting to standing in seconds. It comfortably fits my monitor, laptop, keyboard, and mouse. The surface is spacious enough for a notebook as well.

My only complaint is that the cable management could be better — there are no built-in cable channels, which makes the desk look a bit cluttered. Also, at €289, it is on the pricier side.

Overall, I would recommend it to anyone who wants to improve their posture at work.

questions.prompt: Why did the reviewer buy the product?
choices: To save space on their desk
To address lower back pain from sitting all day
questions.explanation: "after experiencing lower back pain from sitting all day".

questions.prompt: What is the reviewer's main criticism?
choices: It takes too long to set up
It is too heavy to move
questions.explanation: "the cable management could be better — there are no built-in cable channels".

questions.prompt: What is the reviewer's overall conclusion?
choices: They would not buy it again
They would recommend it for improving posture
questions.explanation: "I would recommend it to anyone who wants to improve their posture at work".

items.passage:
STAFF NEWSLETTER — October Edition

EMPLOYEE OF THE MONTH: Congratulations to Priya Menon from the Customer Relations team, who has been named Employee of the Month for October. Priya handled an exceptionally high volume of client escalations this month while maintaining a ninety-six percent satisfaction rating — the highest in her department's history.

UPCOMING EVENTS:
— October 18th: Blood donation drive in the lobby (9 a.m.–3 p.m.)
— October 25th: Quarterly all-hands meeting (2 p.m., Main Auditorium)
— November 1st: Diwali celebration in the staff lounge (12–2 p.m.)

Did you know? Our company has donated over €40,000 to local charities this year through our employee giving programme.

questions.prompt: Why was Priya Menon named Employee of the Month?
choices: She joined the company this month
She achieved the highest sales figures
She handled many escalations with a high satisfaction rating
She completed a major project ahead of schedule
questions.explanation: "handled an exceptionally high volume of client escalations... while maintaining a ninety-six percent satisfaction rating".

questions.prompt: Where will the all-hands meeting take place?
questions.explanation: "October 25th: Quarterly all-hands meeting (2 p.m., Main Auditorium)".

questions.prompt: How much has the company donated to charities this year?
questions.explanation: "donated over €40,000 to local charities this year".
